revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 9 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_submission%2Fpending here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ombox | templatestyles = AfC submission/styles.css | class = afc-submission-pending | type = notice | image =[[Image:AFC-Logo.svg|center|75px]] | text = Review waiting, please be patient. {{AfC status/age}} There are {{AfC status/backlog}} [[:Category:Pending AfC submissions|waiting for review]]. ---- * If the submission is '''accepted''', then this page will be moved into the article space.
* If the submission is '''declined''', then the reason will be posted here.
* In the meantime, you can continue to improve this submission by editing normally. {{AfC submission/helptools}} {{AfC submission/tools |submit={{{submit|}}} |author={{{author|}}} |user={{{user|}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{demo|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|AfC submission| |{{NOINDEX}} {{#ifexist:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|sandbox||}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|template|}} {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|dab|}} {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:2}}|}}{{#ifexpr:{{PAGESIZE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|R}}<450||}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}||{{#ifeq:{{NUMBEROFSECTIONS}}|0|}}}}}} {{documentation|Template:AfC_submission/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions|P{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:{{AfC age category|ts={{{submit|}}}|status=pending}}|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:AfC submissions with the same name as existing articles|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pending template and disambiguation AfC submissions|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:Pending template and disambiguation AfC submissions|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions in userspace]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions less than 450 bytes long]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions without a section]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_submission%2Fpending here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ombox | templatestyles = AfC submission/styles.css | class = afc-submission-pending | type = notice | image =[[Image:AFC-Logo.svg|center|75px]] | text = Review waiting, please be patient. {{AfC status/age}} There are {{AfC status/backlog}} [[:Category:Pending AfC submissions|waiting for review]]. ---- * If the submission is '''accepted''', then this page will be moved into the article space.
* If the submission is '''declined''', then the reason will be posted here.
* In the meantime, you can continue to improve this submission by editing normally. {{AfC submission/helptools}} {{AfC submission/tools |submit={{{submit|}}} |author={{{author|}}} |user={{{user|}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{demo|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|AfC submission| |{{NOINDEX}} {{#ifexist:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|sandbox||}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|template|}} {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|dab|}} {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:2}}|}}{{#ifexpr:{{PAGESIZE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|R}}<450||}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}||{{#ifeq:{{NUMBEROFSECTIONS}}|0|}}}}}} {{documentation|Template:AfC_submission/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions|P{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:{{AfC age category|ts={{{submit|}}}|status=pending}}|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:AfC submissions with the same name as existing articles|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pending template and disambiguation AfC submissions|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:Pending template and disambiguation AfC submissions|{{#if:{{{submit|}}} |{{#expr:trunc({{{submit}}}/100)}}|3 }}]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions in userspace]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions less than 450 bytes long]] [[Category:Pending AfC submissions without a section]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
